info.name: LMS — Student: Marks & Exam Copies (v1)
info.description:
Student app APIs for viewing own marks, overall performance, and exam-copy PDFs.

## Scope

Always auto-scoped to the **authenticated student** — every query is forced to `student_detail_id = own.id` so there's no way to peek at another student's data.

## Endpoints

- **GET `/student/marks`** — list of marks (exam + subject + marks).
- **GET `/student/marks/overall-performance`** — aggregate dashboard (overall %, subject-wise, trend, grades).
- **GET `/student/exam-copies`** — only rows that have an uploaded PDF; each item carries `pdf_url`.
- **GET `/student/exam-copies/{id}`** — single copy with `pdf_url`.

## Auth

Sanctum bearer token in `authToken`.

request.description:
Paginated list of the student's marks. Each row carries the fields a marks-list screen needs:

```
{ exam_name, subject_name, marks_obtained, max_marks, percentage, grade }
```

response.name: Sample 200

request.description:
Single aggregated dashboard payload — feeds the student's performance screen end-to-end:

- `overall_percentage` — across every graded exam
- `subject_wise_performance` — per-subject %, exam count, avg marks
- `performance_trend` — last 5 exams with %
- `grade_distribution` — count of each grade letter

response.name: Sample 200

request.description: Lists only exam rows where a teacher has uploaded a PDF copy. Each item carries `pdf_url` — front-end card tap → open PDF.
Single exam copy. Returns 404 if the id doesn't belong to the caller.
